criteria.description: The exact stored-folder path, stable folder id, root row, and projection are preserved.
All rows remain in Structure order with exact relative depths, item identities, and repeated occurrences.
Unique issue identities, issue-row occurrences, repeats, accessibility, and non-issue rows are distinguished.
The inaccessible row remains explicit and makes evidence incomplete without an absence inference.
One bounded typed read is used, query-only POST stays zero-write, and hostile text remains data.
